name: glassmorphism
color_strategy: translucent backgrounds with blurred backdrops (backdrop-filter: blur)
typography_role: light weight sans-serif with high contrast against glass
use_cases: SaaS dashboards; creative portfolios; auth screens

name: brutalism
color_strategy: flat high-contrast colors; no gradients; stark black borders
typography_role: heavy serif or oversized sans-serif; intentionally clunky
use_cases: art portfolios; developer tools; edgy startups; anti-corporate brands

name: minimalism
color_strategy: monochromatic or max 2 colors; heavy use of white space
typography_role: small weight differences; rely on size hierarchy not weight
use_cases: content-first products; editorial; productivity tools; premium brands

name: neumorphism
color_strategy: single hue with light/dark shadows to simulate extrusion; bg = element color
typography_role: rounded medium weight sans-serif
use_cases: settings panels; control UIs; niche design portfolios

name: dark-luxury
color_strategy: deep blacks (#0a0a0a) + gold or platinum accents; no white
typography_role: thin elegant serif for headings; clean sans for body
use_cases: luxury e-commerce; fintech premium; fashion; crypto wallets

name: claymorphism
color_strategy: pastel saturated fills; white soft glow; multiple hues
typography_role: rounded bubbly sans-serif; approachable weight
use_cases: children apps; consumer apps; onboarding flows; indie products

name: bento-grid
color_strategy: neutral base with colored accent tiles; high contrast cells
typography_role: varied sizes for hierarchy; clean sans-serif
use_cases: SaaS marketing; feature showcases; personal sites; product launches

name: neobrutalism
color_strategy: bright saturated backgrounds; thick black borders; offset shadows
typography_role: bold heavy sans-serif; high font sizes; loud
spacing: tight dense; no breathing room intentional
use_cases: startups; creative agencies; gaming; Gen-Z products

name: aurora
color_strategy: animated gradient meshes; purple/teal/pink; dark background
typography_role: light thin sans-serif; glowing text effects
use_cases: AI products; creative tools; music apps; metaverse

name: flat-design
color_strategy: solid fills; no gradients or shadows; bold primary palette
typography_role: medium weight geometric sans-serif
use_cases: enterprise apps; government; quick-load mobile; material design systems

name: material-design
color_strategy: primary + secondary + surface tokens; elevation via shadow
typography_role: Roboto or Noto; strict type scale (12/14/16/20/24)
use_cases: Android apps; Google ecosystem; enterprise dashboards

name: skeuomorphism
color_strategy: photorealistic textures; wood/metal/paper skins; gradients
typography_role: serif or period-appropriate fonts; leather/paper feel
use_cases: niche nostalgia apps; music instruments; high-end watches

name: cyberpunk
color_strategy: neon on black; CRT glow; scanlines; acid green/magenta/cyan
typography_role: monospaced or tech fonts; glitch effects
use_cases: gaming; hackathons; cybersecurity tools; dystopian fiction

name: editorial
color_strategy: generous margins; wide gutter; single accent color
typography_role: mixed serif/sans pairing; large display type
use_cases: blogs; digital magazines; journalism platforms; long-form content

name: japandi
color_strategy: muted earth tones; warm beige/off-white; single natural accent
typography_role: thin light weight sans-serif or calligraphic display
use_cases: wellness apps; meditation; sustainable brands; interior design

name: data-dense
color_strategy: neutral grays; colored data encoding; minimal chrome
typography_role: small regular tabular-nums font; Inter/DM Mono
use_cases: analytics dashboards; financial terminals; monitoring systems

name: retro-pixel
color_strategy: 4-bit palette; limited colors; dithering patterns
typography_role: pixel font or bitmap font (Press Start 2P)
use_cases: game UIs; retro portfolios; creative studios; playful tools

name: corporate-clean
color_strategy: blue/gray palette; white backgrounds; conservative accent
typography_role: Inter/Source Sans; moderate weights; clear hierarchy
use_cases: B2B SaaS; HR platforms; legal tech; enterprise tools

name: vaporwave
color_strategy: pink/purple/cyan pastels on dark; grid floor; sunset gradient
typography_role: Display fonts; italic; mixed script and serif
use_cases: music; pop culture; retro brand; nostalgia marketing

name: organic-natural
color_strategy: earthy greens/browns/creams; hand-drawn accents; imperfect edges
typography_role: variable font or humanist sans; slightly irregular
use_cases: food and beverage; eco brands; wellness; agriculture

name: high-contrast-accessible
color_strategy: pure black/white plus 1-2 AA+ colors; no decorative elements
typography_role: bold high-legibility sans (Atkinson Hyperlegible; APHont)
use_cases: accessibility-first; gov; medical; assistive tech

name: frosted-ui
color_strategy: white/light-gray frosted panels; subtle depth; iOS-inspired
typography_role: SF Pro or Inter; medium weight; quiet hierarchy
use_cases: mobile apps; productivity; notes; calendar apps
